<!-- headroom:learn:start -->
## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 â€” do not edit manually*

### RTK / Tool Output Guardrails
*~6,500,000 tokens/session saved*
- If a `Read`/`mcp__forge__read_file`/`sed`/`nl`/`cat` output is truncated, do not re-run nearby slices repeatedly; raise the output limit once, read the exact full file once, or extract named symbols/line ranges with `rg`/`awk`.
- For repeated reads/edits of the same file, stop after the second pass and create a local symbol map or focused hunk cache; repeated loops hit `crates/forge-core/src/lib.rs`, `crates/forge-tui/src/app.rs`, `crates/forge-cli/src/main.rs`, `crates/forge-provider/src/cli_provider.rs`, and `crates/forge-store/src/lib.rs` hardest.
- For large Forge files, prefer symbol maps first (`rg -n '^(pub |fn |struct |enum |impl )'`) before reading bodies; do not re-read whole files to rediscover line numbers.

### Forge Large Files
*~4,200,000 tokens/session saved*
- Treat these as known high-cost files: `crates/forge-core/src/lib.rs`, `crates/forge-tui/src/app.rs`, `crates/forge-cli/src/main.rs`, `crates/forge-provider/src/cli_provider.rs`, `crates/forge-store/src/lib.rs`, `crates/forge-mesh/src/lib.rs`, `crates/forge-config/src/lib.rs`, `crates/forge-cli/src/cli/commands/run.rs`, `crates/forge-mesh/src/catalog.rs`, `crates/forge-cli/src/remote.rs`, `crates/forge-provider/src/genai_provider.rs`, and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- For docs/reference files like `docs/roadmap.md`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and feature docs, read once per task and search within cached context instead of reopening.

### Scratch And Temp Artifacts
*~500,000 tokens/session saved*
- Avoid repeated `cat`/`tail`/`Read` loops over `/tmp/claude-1000/...`, `/tmp/forge-scratch/...`, screenshots, and scratchpad files; write a compact summary file once or inspect only the final lines with a bounded `tail`.
- For Python/Node scratch probes, consolidate into one script/run and persist named outputs; do not re-run near-identical commands against the same scratch path.

### GitHub And CI Polling
*~250,000 tokens/session saved*
- Do not loop on `gh pr checks`, `gh run watch`, `gh run view`, or `gh pr view` every few seconds; take one snapshot with JSON, then poll sparingly with bounded attempts only when the state can realistically change.
- Avoid `--watch` and long shell polling loops for PR merges/checks; use `gh pr view --json statusCheckRollup,state,mergeStateStatus` or one `gh run view --json status,conclusion` snapshot first.

### Cargo Verification
*~180,000 tokens/session saved*
- Batch related edits before running `cargo build/test/clippy`; repeated `cargo test --workspace`, `cargo build -p forge-cli`, and `cargo clippy --workspace` loops wasted tokens without new signal.
- Prefer targeted checks for touched crates first (`cargo test -p <crate> <test>`, `cargo build -p forge-cli`) and only run workspace checks once per coherent checkpoint.

### Forge Binary / Commands
*~130,000 tokens/session saved*
- The `forge` binary is often not on `PATH`; check `target/debug/forge` or `target/release/forge` before trying bare `forge`.
- For release checks, avoid `gh pr checks --watch` or long polling loops; use one `gh pr view/checks` snapshot, then poll sparingly with bounded attempts.

### Helm MCP Usage
*~120,000 tokens/session saved*
- Cache Helm note/project/board IDs and note bodies during a task; avoid repeated `mcp__helm__read_note`, `list_dev_projects`, `list_dev_board`, `get_claude_limits`, `refresh_usage`, and identical `update_note` calls.
- If a Helm note update is needed, compose the complete body once and send one update; do not repeatedly rewrite the same note with minor status churn.

### MCP / Subagents
*~65,000 tokens/session saved*
- Do not call `list_mcp_resources {server:"forge"}` unless the Forge MCP server is confirmed running; it repeatedly fails with MCP startup/no such file.
- Avoid repeated `mcp__forge__spawn_agents`, `read_file`, and `shell` calls for the same slice; delegate only narrow read-only tasks and request compact outputs.
- Prefer normal filesystem reads and `rg` over MCP file reads when local files are available.

### Search Scope
*~60,000 tokens/session saved*
- Avoid broad `rg` over `.` with generated dirs; exclude `target`, `.git`, `.claude/worktrees`, `.forge/worktrees`, `graphify-out`, caches, and scratch dirs unless explicitly needed.
- Forge is a Rust workspace without top-level `src` or `tests`; search `crates/**`, `docs/**`, `mobile/**`, and specific crate paths instead of probing nonexistent roots.
- For repeated query batches, combine related `rg` terms in one regex instead of issuing many single-term searches against the same path.

### Task Tracking
*~20,000 tokens/session saved*
- Do not repeatedly call `update_tasks`/`update_plan` with nearly identical completed checklists; update only when a phase materially changes or completes.
- Avoid repeated `ToolSearch` for the same tool name (`TaskCreate`, `TaskUpdate`, `Monitor`, `SendMessage`); cache the result for the turn.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
